overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Batman video game showing the character walking through a foggy, rain-soaked industrial district at night. The character approaches a massive industrial complex with glowing smokestacks, passes a sedan, encounters a pedestrian at an intersection, and turns left onto a side street.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street approaching large factory complex with smokestacks

events.description: sedan car passes by on the right side of the road
character slows slightly as approaching the intersection crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the wet industrial road toward the large factory complex with glowing smokestacks

notable_agents.action: sedan driving past the character from behind toward the foreground

entered.detail: massive factory building with multiple smokestacks emitting orange glow and smoke
tall cylindrical water tower silhouetted against the foggy sky
illuminated advertising billboard on the right side of the street
tall street lamps casting yellow light through the fog
rain-soaked asphalt reflecting streetlights and building lights

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a wide, wet industrial street at night, surrounded by fog. Street lamps cast pools of yellow light on the reflective asphalt. In the distance, a massive industrial complex with glowing smokestacks dominates the skyline. A sedan passes by on the right, and sparse trees line the left sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk in industrial district

events.description: entering the intersection area with crosswalk lines and traffic infrastructure visible
pedestrian in long coat and hat appears standing on the right sidewalk near the corner
character executes a left turn at the intersection onto the perpendicular street

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection, observing the pedestrian, then turning left onto the side street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in coat and hat standing on the sidewalk near the intersection corner

entered.detail: elevated walkway or bridge connecting industrial buildings ahead
tall pole with traffic signals at the intersection corner
white painted stripes marking the pedestrian crossing
industrial building facade at the street corner with large windows
row of industrial buildings lining the left side of the cross street

segments.scene_description: The character approaches an intersection marked by a crosswalk and traffic lights. A pedestrian in a coat stands on the right sidewalk. The character turns left onto a side street, causing the main industrial complex to shift to the right side of the frame before disappearing. New industrial buildings come into view along the left side of the new street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked industrial district that shifts from a wide main thoroughfare to a narrower side street. It begins with the character walking down a wet asphalt road under yellow street lamps, with a massive industrial complex and glowing smokestacks dominating the foggy skyline. As a sedan passes on the right, the camera maintains its forward momentum toward a crosswalk where a pedestrian stands waiting. The scene then shifts as the character turns left at the intersection, causing the distant industrial complex to slide across the frame and disappear from view. Finally, the perspective opens up to reveal a new row of industrial buildings lining the left side of the side street.
